use_cases: Upload and preview video files with drag-and-drop interface
Play and pause uploaded videos with playback controls
Remove uploaded videos with smooth animations
Display upload progress and filename truncation for long names
Trigger animations and callbacks for external state management
ai_summary: A sleek video upload card component featuring drag-and-drop file upload functionality, integrated video playback controls, and smooth framer-motion animations. Supports upload states, video playing/pausing, filename truncation, and removal animations with customizable triggers and callbacks. Perfect for media-rich SaaS applications, e-commerce product uploads, or any platform requiring video file input with visual feedback.
